description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows along the front facade that allow ample natural light into the main living spaces. The interior layout is open, with visible partitioned rooms including a living area with colorful rugs, a kitchen, bathrooms, and bedrooms. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some accent features such as framed artwork and shelving visible through the windows. The front of the bungalow is defined by a series of glass panels, providing a clear view into the main communal area. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass and metal elements for windows and doors. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional spaces suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front glass windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The open-plan interior features colorful rugs and partitioned living spaces visible through the expansive windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, the main entrance, and interior living spaces with colorful rugs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back rooms, less window area, and more solid wall surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a focus on the rear facade, showing smaller windows and utility areas.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the arrangement of rooms, colorful rugs in the living area, and partial window groupings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
